ddls:
CREATE TABLE "banking_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the metric was recorded */,
  "quarter" TEXT /* Quarter the metric was recorded */,
  "bank_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bank the metric belongs to */,
  "net_interest_margin" REAL /* Net interest margin as a percentage */,
  "noninterest_income_to_total_income" REAL /* Noninterest income to total income as a percentage */,
  "overhead_costs_to_total_assets" REAL /* Overhead costs to total assets as a percentage */,
  "return_on_assets" REAL /* Return on assets as a percentage */,
  "return_on_equity" REAL /* Return on equity as a percentage */,
  "z_score" REAL /* Z-score */,
  "boone_indicator" REAL /* Boone indicator */,
  "total_assets" REAL /* Total assets of the bank */,
  "total_loans" REAL /* Total loans of the bank */,
  "total_deposits" REAL /* Total deposits of the bank */,
  "capital_adequacy_ratio" REAL /* Capital adequacy ratio */,
  "loan_growth_rate" REAL /* Loan growth rate */,
  "deposit_growth_rate" REAL /* Deposit growth rate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "banks" (
  "bank_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bank */,
  "bank_name" TEXT /* Name of the bank */,
  "bank_type" TEXT /* Type of bank (e.g., commercial, investment) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the bank */,
  "size_category" TEXT /* Size category of the bank (e.g., small, medium, large) */,
  "charter_type" TEXT /* Type of charter (e.g., national, state) */,
  "founding_year" INTEGER /* Year the bank was founded */,
  "ceo" TEXT /* Name of the CEO */,
  "total_employees" INTEGER /* Total number of employees */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the bank */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bank_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "credit_cards" (
  "credit_card_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each credit card */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric the credit card data belongs to */,
  "bank_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bank the credit card belongs to */,
  "card_type" TEXT /* Type of credit card (e.g., Visa, Mastercard) */,
  "credit_card_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of credit card usage */,
  "average_transaction_amount" REAL /* Average transaction amount per card */,
  "number_of_transactions" INTEGER /* Total number of transactions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("credit_card_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_credit_cards_bank_id FOREIGN KEY ("bank_id") REFERENCES banks ("bank_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_credit_cards_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES banking_metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "debit_cards" (
  "debit_card_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each debit card */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric the debit card data belongs to */,
  "bank_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bank the debit card belongs to */,
  "card_type" TEXT /* Type of debit card (e.g., Visa, Mastercard) */,
  "debit_card_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of debit card usage */,
  "average_transaction_amount" REAL /* Average transaction amount per card */,
  "number_of_transactions" INTEGER /* Total number of transactions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("debit_card_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_debit_cards_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES banking_metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_debit_cards_bank_id FOREIGN KEY ("bank_id") REFERENCES banks ("bank_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "nonbank_financial_institutions" (
  "nfi_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each nonbank financial institution */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric the nonbank financial institution data belongs to */,
  "nfi_type" TEXT /* Type of nonbank financial institution (e.g., insurance, pension funds) */,
  "nfi_assets_to_gdp" REAL /* Nonbank financial institutions' assets to GDP as a percentage */,
  "total_assets" REAL /* Total assets of the nonbank financial institution */,
  "number_of_customers" INTEGER /* Number of customers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("nfi_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_nonbank_financial_institutions_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES banking_metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "nonperforming_loans" (
  "npl_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each nonperforming loan */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric the nonperforming loan data belongs to */,
  "bank_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bank the nonperforming loan belongs to */,
  "loan_purpose" TEXT /* Purpose of the loan (e.g., residential, commercial) */,
  "npl_to_gross_loans" REAL /* Nonperforming loans to gross loans as a percentage */,
  "loan_amount" REAL /* Amount of the nonperforming loan */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("npl_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_nonperforming_loans_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES banking_metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_nonperforming_loans_bank_id FOREIGN KEY ("bank_id") REFERENCES banks ("bank_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bank_branches" (
  "branch_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each branch */,
  "bank_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bank the branch belongs to */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the branch */,
  "branches_per_100k_adults" REAL /* Bank branches per 100,000 adults */,
  "branch_type" TEXT /* Type of branch (e.g., full-service, limited-service) */,
  "branch_manager" TEXT /* Name of the branch manager */,
  "opening_year" INTEGER /* Year the branch was opened */,
  "number_of_employees" INTEGER /* Number of employees at the branch */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("branch_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bank_branches_bank_id FOREIGN KEY ("bank_id") REFERENCES banks ("bank_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cost_to_income_ratios" (
  "cir_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cost to income ratio */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric the cost to income ratio data belongs to */,
  "bank_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bank the cost to income ratio belongs to */,
  "cost_to_income_ratio" REAL /* Cost to income ratio as a percentage */,
  "operating_expenses" REAL /* Operating expenses */,
  "operating_income" REAL /* Operating income */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cir_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cost_to_income_ratios_bank_id FOREIGN KEY ("bank_id") REFERENCES banks ("bank_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cost_to_income_ratios_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES banking_metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bank_concentration" (
  "bc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bank concentration */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric the bank concentration data belongs to */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the bank concentration is measured */,
  "bank_concentration" REAL /* Bank concentration as a percentage */,
  "number_of_banks" INTEGER /* Number of banks in the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bank_concentration_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES banking_metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "domestic_credit" (
  "dc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each domestic credit */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric the domestic credit data belongs to */,
  "bank_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bank the domestic credit belongs to */,
  "credit_type" TEXT /* Type of credit (e.g., consumer, business) */,
  "domestic_credit_to_private_sector" REAL /* Domestic credit to private sector as a percentage of GDP */,
  "credit_amount" REAL /* Amount of credit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_domestic_credit_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES banking_metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_domestic_credit_bank_id FOREIGN KEY ("bank_id") REFERENCES banks ("bank_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., regulator, analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access (e.g., read, write) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the metric */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the metric was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the access device */,
  "duration" REAL /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES banking_metrics ("metric_id")
)
